title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 100.100 - Revenue bonds authorized, how paid
text:
100.100.  Revenue bonds authorized, how paid. — Any municipality may issue revenue bonds to provide funds for the carrying out of a project under sections 100.010 to 100.200.  The revenue bonds shall be paid solely from revenue received from the project, and shall not be a general obligation of the municipality.
(L. 1961 p. 189 § 10, A.L. 1976 H.B. 1359, A.L. 1992 H.B. 1380) 
Effective 3-11-92
